_comment: Matching priority per event: 'pattern' (regex) → 'keywords' (substrings) → fuzzy match against 'effect' text. Patterns use '|' for OR and '.' to match any single char (handy where OCR may misread apostrophes/hyphens).

events.name: Exotic Ore Notif
events.effect: A chill goes down your spine...

events.name: Exquisite Ore Notif
events.effect: Your heart skips a beat...

events.name: Transcendent Ore Notif
events.effect: You hear a ringing in your ears...

events.name: Enigmatic Ore Notif
events.effect: Your vision begins to blur...

events.name: Mine Reset
events.effect: Mine capacity is refreshing

events.name: Idolium Notif
events.effect: Polychromatic lights fly all around you as you slowly lose control...

events.name: Scribbal Notif
events.effect: Fiction takes hold of reality...

events.name: Terraromere Notif
events.effect: Verdant, glowing blades pierce through the rock around you...

events.name: Endozivite Notif
events.effect: A colossal vortex tears through the air...

events.name: Inclemetite Notif
events.pattern: air thins out|frost begins|accumulate on every inch
events.effect: The air thins out as frost begins to accumulate on every inch of your body...

events.name: Illusory Bubblegram Notif
events.pattern: your body lighten|as all light|loses its color
events.effect: You feel your body lighten in the air as all light around you loses its color...

events.pattern: The awakening of|terrible beast|dread into your
events.effect: The awakening of a terrible beast strikes dread into your heart...

events.name: Caelarius Notif
events.effect: A boundless veil envelopes you in eternal frost...

events.name: Quasar 618 Notif
events.effect: A gargantuan nucleus destabilizes the mine around you...

events.effect: Frequencies resonate through the firmament, unveiling transmissions lost to time...

events.effect: A brilliant celadon light infuses your soul...

events.effect: Celestial bodies of a bygone era dance through the fabric of space...

events.effect: 404: MESSAGE NOT FOUND. RETURNING TO EVENT IN x SECONDS.

events.effect: A stellar beam streaks the sky, relaying the essences of life to distant worlds...
